message:
refactor(multiprocessing): Implement CPython-compatible submodules

Implement full CPython API compatibility for multiprocessing package:

context.zig:
- BaseContext with factory methods for Process, Lock, Queue, etc.
- StartMethod enum (fork, spawn, forkserver)
- ForkContext, SpawnContext, ForkServerContext
- Platform-specific default methods

dummy.zig + dummy/connection.zig:
- Thread-based Process, Pool, Lock, Event, Semaphore, Barrier
- Queue-based Connection for inter-thread communication
- Mimics multiprocessing API using threading

forkserver.zig:
- ForkServer class with ensure_running, preload support
- connect_to_new_process for spawning via forkserver

heap.zig:
- Arena (mmap-backed shared memory regions)
- Heap allocator for shared arenas
- BufferWrapper with automatic cleanup

popen modules:
- popen_fork.zig: Fork-based Popen (Unix default)
- popen_forkserver.zig: Forkserver-based Popen
- popen_spawn_posix.zig: posix_spawn Popen (macOS default)
- popen_spawn_win32.zig: CreateProcess Popen (Windows)

reduction.zig:
- ForkingPickler for serialization
- DupFd, DupHandle for fd/handle passing
- sendfds/recvfds using SCM_RIGHTS

resource_sharer.zig:
- DupSocket for socket sharing
- ResourceSharer server for resource transfers

resource_tracker.zig:
- ResourceTracker process for cleanup tracking
- register/unregister with resource types

shared_memory.zig:
- SharedMemory using POSIX shm or temp files
- ShareableList generic type for shared arrays

spawn.zig:
- get_executable, set_executable
- get_preparation_data, get_command_line
- freeze_support for Windows

util.zig:
- Logging (SUBDEBUG, SUBWARNING, etc.)
- ForkAwareThreadLock, ForkAwareLocal
- register_after_fork, close_all_fds_except
- Finalize for weak reference cleanup

All modules include unit tests.
